Star Atlas - Q1 State of the Economy Report

Sit back, relax and read the latest State of the Economy report! 

This quarter marked continued evolution away from passive ATLAS emissions to gameplay and projects an annual GDP of $32,120,000. 

 | Stay informed on the growing Star Atlas economy: https://staratlas.com/newsroom/economic-reports
